title: In Fervent Praise Of Picnics
content:
Picnics is fun 'at's purty hard to beat.
     I purt'-nigh ruther go to them than eat.
     I purt'-nigh ruther go to them than go
     With our Charlotty to the Trick-Dog Show.
meaning:
"In Fervent Praise Of Picnics" is a quintessential example of James Whitcomb Riley's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
